# @aai-agency/og-components - Full API Reference

> Oil & Gas asset map components for React. By AAI Agency.
> This is the definitive reference for AI agents to use the library without reading source code.

Package: @aai-agency/og-components
License: MIT
Requirements: React 18+, Mapbox access token (https://account.mapbox.com/access-tokens/)

================================================================================
INSTALLATION
================================================================================

  pnpm add @aai-agency/og-components

Required CSS import:

  import "mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css";

For standalone ProductionChart usage, also import:

  import "uplot/dist/uPlot.min.css";

================================================================================
EXPORTS OVERVIEW
================================================================================

Main entry: "@aai-agency/og-components"
  Components: OGMap, MapControls, AssetDetailCard, ProductionChart,
              OverlayManager, SelectionSummaryCard, SelectionPanel,
              FilterChips, MiniCard
  Helpers:    assetToMiniCard, overlayFeatureToMiniCard

Sub-path exports:
  "@aai-agency/og-components/utils"     - Data validation, formatting, color, CSV
  "@aai-agency/og-components/schemas"   - Zod schemas and parse helpers
  "@aai-agency/og-components/services"  - Storage backends (localStorage, SQLite, in-memory)

================================================================================
CORE TYPES
================================================================================

--- Coordinates ---
  interface Coordinates {
    lat: number;    // -90 to 90
    lng: number;    // -180 to 180
  }

--- LineGeometry ---
  type LineGeometry = Coordinates[];
  // A polyline. Array of coordinate pairs forming a line (e.g., pipeline route).

--- PolygonGeometry ---
  type PolygonGeometry = Coordinates[];
  // Array of coordinate pairs forming a closed ring.

--- AssetType ---
  type BuiltInAssetType =
    "well" | "meter" | "pipeline" | "facility" | "tank" |
    "compressor" | "valve" | "pump" | "separator" | "injection-point";
  type AssetType = BuiltInAssetType | string;
  // Built-in types drive default icon, color, and tooltip behavior.
  // You can also pass any custom string.

--- AssetStatus ---
  type AssetStatus =
    "active" | "inactive" | "producing" | "shut-in" | "drilled" |
    "permitted" | "abandoned" | "injection" | "maintenance" | "offline"
    | string;

--- Asset (core model) ---
  interface Asset {
    id: string;                          // Unique identifier
    name: string;                        // Display name on the map
    type: AssetType;                     // Drives icon and color defaults
    status: AssetStatus;                 // Current operational status
    coordinates: Coordinates;            // Primary location (required)
    lines?: LineGeometry[];              // Line geometry for pipelines, routes
    polygons?: PolygonGeometry[];        // Polygon geometry for lease boundaries, pads
    properties: Record<string, unknown>; // Type-specific data (well data, meter readings, etc.)
    meta?: Record<string, unknown>;      // Arbitrary metadata, tags, labels
    createdAt?: string;                  // ISO timestamp
    updatedAt?: string;                  // ISO timestamp
  }

--- ColorScheme ---
  type ColorScheme =
    "status" | "type" | "operator" | "production" |
    "wellType" | "waterCut" | "basin" | string;

--- MapViewState ---
  interface MapViewState {
    longitude: number;
    latitude: number;
    zoom: number;
    bearing?: number;
    pitch?: number;
  }

--- AssetCluster ---
  interface AssetCluster {
    id: string;
    coordinates: Coordinates;
    count: number;
    assets: Asset[];
    expansionZoom: number;
  }

--- FieldConfig ---
  interface FieldConfig {
    key: string;       // Property key path (e.g., "properties.cumOil")
    label: string;     // Display label
    format?: string;   // "number", "date", "currency", "percentage", or custom
    unit?: string;     // Unit suffix (e.g., "BBL", "ft", "PSI")
  }

--- AssetTypeConfig ---
  interface AssetTypeConfig {
    type: AssetType;
    label: string;
    color: string;                          // Default marker color (hex)
    markerSize?: number;                    // Marker size in pixels
    icon?: string;                          // Built-in name or URL to custom icon
    lineWidth?: number;                     // For line assets: stroke width
    lineDash?: number[];                    // For line assets: stroke dash pattern
    tooltipFields?: FieldConfig[];          // Fields to show in the tooltip
    detailFields?: FieldConfig[];           // Fields to show in the detail panel
    statusColors?: Record<string, string>;  // Color map for status values
  }

================================================================================
WELL-SPECIFIC TYPES (O&G convenience)
================================================================================

  type FluidType = "oil" | "gas" | "water";
  type CurveType = "actual" | "forecast";
  type Frequency = "daily" | "monthly";
  type Unit = "BBL" | "MSCF" | "BOE" | "MCFE";
  type WellType = "oil" | "gas" | "injection" | "disposal" | "observation";
  type Trajectory = "horizontal" | "vertical" | "directional";

--- DataPoint ---
  interface DataPoint {
    date: string;    // ISO date string (e.g., "2023-01-01")
    value: number;
  }

--- TimeSeries ---
  interface TimeSeries {
    id: string;
    fluidType: FluidType;
    curveType: CurveType;
    unit: Unit;
    frequency: Frequency;
    data: DataPoint[];
  }

--- WellProperties ---
  interface WellProperties {
    api?: string;
    operator?: string;
    wellType?: WellType;
    trajectory?: Trajectory;
    basin?: string;
    play?: string;
    formation?: string;
    county?: string;
    state?: string;
    firstProdDate?: string;
    spudDate?: string;
    tvd?: number;                    // True vertical depth (ft)
    md?: number;                     // Measured depth (ft)
    lateralLength?: number;          // Lateral length (ft)
    cumOil?: number;                 // Cumulative oil (BBL)
    cumGas?: number;                 // Cumulative gas (MSCF)
    cumWater?: number;               // Cumulative water (BBL)
    cumBOE?: number;                 // Cumulative barrels of oil equivalent
    peakOil?: number;                // Peak oil production (BBL)
    peakGas?: number;                // Peak gas production (MCF)
    coordinatesBH?: Coordinates;     // Bottom-hole coordinates
    timeSeries?: TimeSeries[];       // Production time series for charts
  }

================================================================================
OVERLAY TYPES
================================================================================

  type OverlayType = "kmz" | "kml" | "geojson" | "shapefile" | "image" | "custom";

--- OverlayStyle ---
  interface OverlayStyle {
    fillColor?: string;
    fillOpacity?: number;
    strokeColor?: string;
    strokeWidth?: number;
  }

--- OverlayFeatureOverride ---
  interface OverlayFeatureOverride {
    featureIndex: number;    // Index of the feature in the FeatureCollection
    visible?: boolean;
    style?: OverlayStyle;
  }

--- MapOverlay ---
  interface MapOverlay {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    type: OverlayType;
    visible: boolean;
    geojson: GeoJSON.FeatureCollection;
    fileName?: string;
    style?: OverlayStyle;
    featureOverrides?: OverlayFeatureOverride[];
    version?: number;
    uploadedAt?: string;
    imageUrl?: string;                               // For image overlays
    imageBounds?: [number, number, number, number];   // [west, south, east, north]
  }

--- SavedMapView ---
  interface SavedMapView {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    viewState: MapViewState;
    colorBy?: ColorScheme;
    visibleOverlayIds?: string[];
    createdAt: string;
    updatedAt?: string;
  }

================================================================================
SERVICE LAYER TYPES
================================================================================

--- AssetQuery ---
  interface AssetQuery {
    types?: AssetType[];
    statuses?: AssetStatus[];
    bounds?: [number, number, number, number];   // [west, south, east, north]
    search?: string;                             // Free-text search
    limit?: number;
    offset?: number;
  }

--- StoreExport ---
  interface StoreExport {
    version: 1;
    exportedAt: string;
    assets: Asset[];
    overlays: MapOverlay[];
    mapViews: SavedMapView[];
    preferences: Record<string, unknown>;
  }

--- AssetStore (interface) ---
  interface AssetStore {
    // Assets
    getAssets(query?: AssetQuery): Promise<Asset[]>;
    getAsset(id: string): Promise<Asset | null>;
    createAsset(asset: Asset): Promise<Asset>;
    createAssets(assets: Asset[]): Promise<Asset[]>;
    updateAsset(id: string, data: Partial<Asset>): Promise<Asset>;
    deleteAsset(id: string): Promise<void>;

    // Overlays
    getOverlays(): Promise<MapOverlay[]>;
    saveOverlay(overlay: MapOverlay): Promise<MapOverlay>;
    deleteOverlay(id: string): Promise<void>;

    // Saved map views (bookmarks)
    getMapViews(): Promise<SavedMapView[]>;
    saveMapView(view: SavedMapView): Promise<SavedMapView>;
    deleteMapView(id: string): Promise<void>;

    // Preferences (key-value)
    getPreference<T = unknown>(key: string): Promise<T | null>;
    savePreference(key: string, value: unknown): Promise<void>;

    // Migration
    exportAll(): Promise<StoreExport>;
    importAll(data: StoreExport): Promise<void>;
  }

================================================================================
COMPONENT PROPS
================================================================================

--- OGMapProps ---
  interface OGMapProps {
    assets?: Asset[];                    // Data to render on the map
    mapboxAccessToken: string;           // Required. Your Mapbox token.
    initialViewState?: MapViewState;     // Auto-computed from assets if omitted
    colorBy?: ColorScheme;               // Color assets by this scheme. Default: "status"
    typeConfigs?: AssetTypeConfig[];     // Per-type display config (icons, colors, fields)
    store?: AssetStore;                  // Storage backend for persistence
    onAssetClick?: (asset: Asset) => void;
    onAssetHover?: (asset: Asset | null) => void;
    onViewStateChange?: (viewState: MapViewState) => void;
    cluster?: boolean;                   // Enable clustering. Default: false
    clusterMaxZoom?: number;             // Min zoom for cluster expansion. Default: 10
    clusterRadius?: number;              // Cluster radius in pixels. Default: 50
    showAssetCount?: boolean;            // Show asset count badge. Default: true
    showLegend?: boolean;                // Show color legend. Default: true
    enableOverlayUpload?: boolean;       // Enable KMZ/KML/GeoJSON upload. Default: false
    mapStyle?: string;                   // Mapbox style URL. Default: "mapbox://styles/mapbox/light-v11"
    height?: string | number;            // Default: "500px"
    width?: string | number;             // Default: "100%"
    className?: string;
    style?: CSSProperties;
    renderTooltip?: (asset: Asset) => ReactNode;
    interactive?: boolean;               // Allow panning, zooming, clicking. Default: true
    controls?: MapControlId[];           // Which toolbar buttons to show. Default: all
    layers?: MapLayerId[];               // Which map layers to show. Default: all
    onDrawCreate?: (features: Feature[]) => void;
    onDrawDelete?: () => void;
    onLassoSelect?: (assets: Asset[], overlayFeatures: SelectedOverlayFeature[]) => void;
    showControls?: boolean;              // Show map controls panel. Default: true
    showDetailCard?: boolean;            // Show detail card on click. Default: true
    detailSections?: AssetDetailSection[];
    renderDetailHeader?: (asset: Asset) => ReactNode;
    renderDetailBody?: (asset: Asset) => ReactNode;
    onDetailClose?: () => void;
  }

--- MapControlId (available controls) ---
  "pan" | "zoom" | "fullscreen" | "center" |
  "draw-polygon" | "draw-rectangle" | "draw-circle" | "layers"

--- MapLayerId (available layers) ---
  "assets" | "clusters" | "lines" | "overlays" | "labels"

--- ChartAnnotation ---
  interface ChartAnnotation {
    id: string;
    from: number;                        // Start timestamp (epoch seconds)
    to: number;                          // End timestamp (epoch seconds)
    text: string;                        // User-provided text
    color?: string;                      // Color of the annotation region
    expanded?: boolean;                  // Whether the annotation text is expanded
  }

--- ProductionChartProps ---
  interface ProductionChartProps {
    series: TimeSeries[];                // One or more time series to plot (required)
    height?: number;                     // Chart height in pixels. Default: 220
    width?: number;                      // Chart width in pixels. Fills container if omitted.
    showForecast?: boolean;              // Show forecast series with dashed lines. Default: true
    colors?: Partial<Record<string, string>>;  // Custom color map by fluidType (defaults: oil=#22c55e, gas=#ef4444, water=#3b82f6)
    rightAxisFluids?: string[];          // Which fluid types use the right axis. Default: ["gas"]
    showBrush?: boolean;                 // Show overview brush/scrubber for timeline zoom. Default: true
    enableAnnotations?: boolean;         // Enable annotations. Default: true
    annotations?: ChartAnnotation[];     // Controlled annotations (if provided, component is controlled)
    onAnnotationsChange?: (annotations: ChartAnnotation[]) => void;  // Called when annotations change
    formatXValue?: (value: number) => string;  // Custom x-axis value formatter (epoch seconds or raw number)
    xAxisLabel?: string;                 // X-axis label (e.g., "Days on Production", "Date", "Cum BOE")
    showVarianceFill?: boolean;          // Show variance fill between actual and forecast. Default: false
    forecastOffset?: number;             // Vertical offset for forecast line drag adjustment
    onForecastOffsetChange?: (offset: number) => void;  // Called when user drags forecast line
  }

--- AssetDetailCardProps ---
  interface AssetDetailCardProps {
    asset: Asset | null;                 // The asset to display. Pass null to hide. (required)
    typeConfigs?: Map<string, AssetTypeConfig>;  // Per-type display config for field labels and section layout
    sections?: AssetDetailSection[];     // Custom sections to display. Falls back to default O&G sections if omitted.
    onClose?: () => void;                // Called when the user closes the card
    renderHeader?: (asset: Asset) => ReactNode;   // Custom renderer for the header area
    renderSection?: (section: AssetDetailSection, asset: Asset) => ReactNode;  // Custom renderer for a section
    renderBody?: (asset: Asset) => ReactNode;     // Custom renderer for the entire card body
    className?: string;                  // Additional className for the container
    style?: CSSProperties;               // Additional inline styles
    mobileBreakpoint?: number;           // Breakpoint for mobile drawer vs desktop panel. Default: 768
  }

--- AssetDetailSection ---
  interface AssetDetailSection {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    fields: FieldConfig[];
  }

--- MiniCardProps / MiniCardItem ---
  Compact card for asset summaries in selection panels.
  Helpers: assetToMiniCard(asset) and overlayFeatureToMiniCard(feature)

================================================================================
ZOD SCHEMAS (from "@aai-agency/og-components/schemas")
================================================================================

  CoordinatesSchema      - z.object({ lat: z.number().min(-90).max(90), lng: z.number().min(-180).max(180) })
  DataPointSchema        - z.object({ date: z.string(), value: z.number() })
  TimeSeriesSchema       - Validates TimeSeries objects (id, fluidType, curveType, unit, frequency, data)
  AssetSchema            - Validates a single Asset object
  AssetArraySchema       - z.array(AssetSchema)
  FieldConfigSchema      - Validates FieldConfig objects
  AssetTypeConfigSchema  - Validates AssetTypeConfig objects
  MapOverlaySchema       - Validates MapOverlay objects

  parseAssets(data: unknown): Asset[]
    Parse and validate asset data. Throws on invalid input.

  safeParseAssets(data: unknown): z.SafeParseReturnType<Asset[]>
    Safely parse assets. Returns result object with success flag and errors.

================================================================================
UTILITY FUNCTIONS (from "@aai-agency/og-components/utils")
================================================================================

  isValidCoordinates(coords: Coordinates | null | undefined): boolean
    Check if coordinates are within WGS84 bounds and non-NaN.
    Example: isValidCoordinates({ lat: 48.12, lng: -103.45 }) // true

  filterPlottable<T extends { coordinates: Coordinates }>(items: T[]): T[]
    Filter items to only those with valid, plottable coordinates.
    Example: const valid = filterPlottable(assets);

  computeBounds(items, padding?: number): { minLat, maxLat, minLng, maxLng }
    Compute bounding box for a set of assets. Default padding: 0.5 degrees.
    Returns Texas-area default if items is empty.

  fitBounds(items): MapViewState
    Compute an initial view state (longitude, latitude, zoom) that fits all items.
    Example: const view = fitBounds(assets);

  getAssetColor(asset: Asset, scheme: ColorScheme, typeConfigs?: Map<string, AssetTypeConfig>): string
    Get the hex color for an asset based on the active color scheme.
    Checks user-provided typeConfigs first, then falls back to built-in color maps.

  formatNumber(value: number, decimals?: number): string
    Format large numbers for display. Default: 1 decimal.
    Examples: formatNumber(1234567) -> "1.2M", formatNumber(45000) -> "45.0K"

  groupBy<T>(items: T[], key: (item: T) => string): Map<string, T[]>
    Group items by a key function. Returns a Map of arrays.

  csvRowToAsset(row: Record<string, string>): Asset
    Convert a CSV row (Enverus/IHS-style column names) to an Asset with type "well".
    Recognized columns: API_UWI, WellID, WellName, Latitude, Longitude, ENVWellStatus,
    ENVOperator, ENVProdWellType, Trajectory, ENVBasin, ENVPlay, Formation, County,
    StateProvince, FirstProdDate, SpudDate, TVD_FT, MD_FT, LateralLength_FT,
    CumOil_BBL, CumGas_MCF, CumWater_BBL, CumProd_BOE, PeakOil_BBL, PeakGas_MCF,
    Latitude_BH, Longitude_BH, and more.

================================================================================
STORAGE SERVICES (from "@aai-agency/og-components/services")
================================================================================

  LocalStorageStore
    new LocalStorageStore(namespace: string)
    Persists assets, overlays, views, and preferences to browser localStorage.
    Best for small to medium datasets (under 10,000 assets).

  InMemoryStore
    new InMemoryStore()
    Stores everything in memory. Useful for testing or temporary data.
    Data is lost on page refresh.

  SqliteStore / createSqliteStore
    const store = await createSqliteStore(namespace: string)
    Uses in-browser SQLite (sql.js) for large datasets (10,000+ assets).
    Async factory function because it needs to initialize the WASM module.

  migrateStore(source: AssetStore, target: AssetStore): Promise<void>
    Migrate all data from one store to another. Useful for switching backends.

================================================================================
COLOR SCHEME DETAILS
================================================================================

  "status" colors:
    producing  -> green (#22c55e)
    shut-in    -> yellow (#eab308)
    abandoned  -> gray (#6b7280)
    Other statuses fall back to gray.

  "type" colors:
    Each built-in asset type gets a unique color from the TYPE_COLORS map.

  "wellType" colors:
    oil        -> green
    gas        -> red
    injection  -> cyan
    Other well types fall back to gray.

  "production" colors (based on cumBOE or cumOil):
    > 500,000  -> green (#22c55e)
    > 100,000  -> indigo (#6366f1)
    > 10,000   -> amber (#f59e0b)
    <= 10,000  -> slate (#94a3b8)

  "waterCut" colors (water / (oil + water)):
    > 70%      -> red (#ef4444)
    > 40%      -> amber (#f59e0b)
    <= 40%     -> green (#22c55e)
    No data    -> slate (#94a3b8)

  "operator" and "basin":
    Unique color per distinct value from the typeConfigs or default palette.

================================================================================
OVERLAY FILE FORMAT SUPPORT
================================================================================

  KMZ   (.kmz)                              - Compressed KML archives
  KML   (.kml)                              - Google Earth markup
  GeoJSON (.geojson or .json)               - Standard GeoJSON FeatureCollections
  Shapefile (.zip containing .shp/.dbf/.prj) - ESRI Shapefiles in a zip archive

  Enable with: <OGMap enableOverlayUpload />
  Users can drag-and-drop files onto the map, change overlay colors,
  and toggle feature visibility.

================================================================================
XSTATE MAP MACHINE
================================================================================

  mapMachine - XState state machine that drives OGMap internally.
  Exported for advanced use cases where you need direct control.

  Types: MapContext, MapEvent, MapInput, MapMachine

================================================================================
CODE EXAMPLES
================================================================================

--- Minimal Map ---

  import { OGMap, type Asset } from "@aai-agency/og-components";
  import "mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css";

  const assets: Asset[] = [
    {
      id: "well-001",
      name: "COASTAL 14-29H",
      type: "well",
      status: "producing",
      coordinates: { lat: 48.12, lng: -103.45 },
      properties: { operator: "Coastal Energy", basin: "Bakken", cumOil: 245000 },
    },
  ];

  function App() {
    return <OGMap assets={assets} mapboxAccessToken={YOUR_MAPBOX_TOKEN} />;
  }

--- Full-featured Map ---

  <OGMap
    assets={assets}
    mapboxAccessToken={YOUR_MAPBOX_TOKEN}
    colorBy="status"
    enableOverlayUpload
    showDetailCard
    cluster
    controls={["pan", "zoom", "fullscreen", "center", "draw-polygon", "layers"]}
    layers={["assets", "lines", "clusters"]}
    onAssetClick={(asset) => console.log("Clicked:", asset.name)}
    onLassoSelect={(selected) => console.log("Selected:", selected.length)}
    detailSections={[
      {
        id: "reservoir",
        title: "Reservoir Data",
        fields: [
          { key: "properties.porosity", label: "Porosity", format: "percentage" },
          { key: "properties.netPay", label: "Net Pay", format: "number", unit: "ft" },
        ],
      },
    ]}
  />

--- Pipeline Asset ---

  const pipeline: Asset = {
    id: "pipe-001",
    name: "Gathering Line A-12",
    type: "pipeline",
    status: "active",
    coordinates: { lat: 48.0, lng: -103.0 },
    lines: [[
      { lat: 48.0, lng: -103.0 },
      { lat: 48.1, lng: -103.1 },
      { lat: 48.2, lng: -103.0 },
    ]],
    properties: { diameter: 8, material: "steel" },
  };

--- Well with Production Time Series ---

  const well: Asset = {
    id: "well-002",
    name: "BAKKEN 7-14H",
    type: "well",
    status: "producing",
    coordinates: { lat: 48.5, lng: -103.2 },
    properties: {
      api: "33-061-05678",
      operator: "Dakota Energy",
      wellType: "oil",
      trajectory: "horizontal",
      basin: "Bakken",
      cumOil: 180000,
      cumGas: 290000,
      cumBOE: 230000,
      timeSeries: [
        {
          id: "oil-actual",
          fluidType: "oil",
          curveType: "actual",
          unit: "BBL",
          frequency: "monthly",
          data: [
            { date: "2023-01-01", value: 12000 },
            { date: "2023-02-01", value: 11200 },
            { date: "2023-03-01", value: 10500 },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
  };

--- Standalone Production Chart ---

  import { ProductionChart } from "@aai-agency/og-components";
  import "uplot/dist/uPlot.min.css";

  <ProductionChart
    series={[
      {
        id: "oil",
        fluidType: "oil",
        curveType: "actual",
        unit: "BBL",
        frequency: "monthly",
        data: [
          { date: "2023-01-01", value: 12000 },
          { date: "2023-02-01", value: 11200 },
        ],
      },
    ]}
    height={200}
    colors={{ oil: "#22c55e", gas: "#ef4444", water: "#3b82f6" }}
  />

--- Persisting Data with LocalStorageStore ---

  import { OGMap } from "@aai-agency/og-components";
  import { LocalStorageStore } from "@aai-agency/og-components/services";

  const store = new LocalStorageStore("my-app");

  <OGMap store={store} assets={assets} mapboxAccessToken={YOUR_MAPBOX_TOKEN} />

--- Large Dataset with SQLite ---

  import { OGMap } from "@aai-agency/og-components";
  import { createSqliteStore } from "@aai-agency/og-components/services";

  const store = await createSqliteStore("my-app");

  <OGMap store={store} assets={assets} mapboxAccessToken={YOUR_MAPBOX_TOKEN} />

--- Validating Asset Data ---

  import { parseAssets, safeParseAssets } from "@aai-agency/og-components/schemas";

  // Throws on invalid data
  const validated = parseAssets(untrustedData);

  // Returns { success, data, error } without throwing
  const result = safeParseAssets(untrustedData);
  if (result.success) {
    console.log("Valid assets:", result.data.length);
  } else {
    console.error("Validation errors:", result.error);
  }

--- CSV Import (Enverus/IHS format) ---

  import { csvRowToAsset } from "@aai-agency/og-components/utils";
  import { filterPlottable } from "@aai-agency/og-components/utils";

  const csvRows = parseCsvFile(file); // your CSV parser
  const assets = csvRows.map(csvRowToAsset);
  const plottable = filterPlottable(assets);

--- Migrating Between Stores ---

  import { LocalStorageStore, createSqliteStore, migrateStore } from "@aai-agency/og-components/services";

  const oldStore = new LocalStorageStore("my-app");
  const newStore = await createSqliteStore("my-app-v2");
  await migrateStore(oldStore, newStore);

SUPPORT
